The Great Relexification was a program done by [[Immanuelle]] after writing [[A brief treatise of the soul]]. It can be seen in the edit history of the document

It was done in order to avoid corrupted terms and eccentrically used terms from other traditions. 

== Globalization ==
Having all terms ones with clear English meanings means there are two benefits to globalization

# Words can be calqued effectively into foreign languages without loss of meaning
# Words can be taken as loanwords into other languages, using the prestige of English to come off authoritative

[[Category:History]]
[[sn:Great Relexification]][[Category:2022]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Great Relexification]][[sn:Great Relexification]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
